snippet.title: DIOR大穎 - 她已不再是那個女孩 - (荒唐random MV)
snippet.description:
上天會用更好的安排
帶你穿過黑夜 走過陰霾 ✨


《她已不再是那個女孩》

作詞：DIOR 大穎
作曲：DIOR 大穎
演唱：DIOR 大穎

親愛的你啊
經歷過無數和自己的對話
明知道會受傷 還逞強 不害怕

我最愛的你啊
你落落大方的 接受變化
你走出世俗的框架
你不是 傻瓜

你帶著滿身泥沙
一個人離開了家
放下了多少牽掛
漸漸明白 這就是長大

她已不再是那個女孩
她不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
風起雨落 命運重新安排

她已不再是那個女孩
用真心交換 未知的未來
流過淚的眼 還是充滿期待
即便一路跌倒 滿身塵埃
放心 會好起來

當我回頭望 我走過好漫長的路
好多人陪著我 讓我覺得我好幸福

我帶著滿身泥沙
一個人離開了家
我偶爾還是會害怕
但我堅信前路 會開滿鮮花

她已不再是那個女孩
她不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
風起雨落 命運重新安排

我已不再是那個女孩
用真心交換 未知的未來
流過淚的眼 洗淨塵埃
雨過天晴之後
相信 會好起來

那一夜那個女孩 她再也不會回來
那一天那個女孩 她留在茫茫人海
那一年那個女孩 學會釋懷生命所有離開
她相信一切會有 更好的安排

她已不再是那個女孩
不再用雙手抓緊未來
輕輕放開 把一切歸還給人海
經歷風雨過後 我才明白

上天會用更好的安排
帶你穿過黑夜 走過陰霾
雖然現在 我已不再是那個女孩
但我依舊 勇敢去愛
那個女孩她 還相信愛

snippet.title: 功夫女足｜Kung Fu Soccer | Official Trailer | 正式预告片    ｜Coming to GSC starting 13 August 2026
snippet.description:
《#功夫女足》首支正式预告，火热来袭！周星驰，回来了！🔥⚽

神级功夫 × 足球热血 × 爆笑无厘头，这一次踢出全新的传奇！⚽ 热血一脚，征服全世界！

由张小斐、迪丽热巴、张艺兴领衔主演，刘嘉玲、佐藤健特别出演。

准备好迎接今年最疯狂、最热血、最好笑的足球盛宴了吗？

🎬《功夫女足》🇲🇾8月13日 全马GSC戏院热血上映！

⚽🔥 The wait is over… Stephen Chow returns with #KUNGFUSOCCER!

The official trailer is finally here! Watch it now! 

🥋 Legendary kung fu. ⚽ Adrenaline-fuelled football. 😂 Stephen Chow’s signature comedy.

Explosive action. Out-of-this-world skills. Non-stop laughs. One unforgettable underdog adventure.

⚽ One Passionate Kick. Conquer the World.

Starring Zhang Xiaofei, Dilraba Dilmurat, and Lay Zhang, with special appearances by Carina Lau and Takeru Satoh.

Get ready for the year’s wildest, most action-packed, laugh-out-loud football spectacle!

🎬 KUNG FU SOCCER
🇲🇾 In GSC starting 13.08.2026! 

#StephenChow #周星驰 #EncoreFilms

snippet.title: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
♫ Katy Perry - The One That Got Away (Lyrics)
⭐ Download/Stream: 

🎤 Lyrics: Katy Perry - The One That Got Away 

[Verse 1]
Summer after high school, when we first met
We'd make out in your Mustang to Radiohead
And on my eighteenth birthday, we got matching tattoos
Used to steal your parents' liquor and climb to the roof
Talked about our future like we had a clue
Never planned that one day, I'd be losing you

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Verse 2]
I was June, and you were my Johnny Cash
Never one without the other, we made a pact
Sometimes when I miss you, I put those records on, woah
Someone said you had your tattoo removed
Saw you downtown, singing the blues
It's time to face the music, I'm no longer your muse

[Chorus]
But in another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

[Post-Chorus]
The one
The one
The one
The one that got away

[Bridge]
All this money can't buy me a time machine, no
Can't replace you with a million rings, no
I should've told you what you meant to me, woah
'Cause now I pay the price

[Chorus]
In another life
I would be your girl
We'd keep all our promises
Be us against the world
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away (The one that got away)


[Post-Chorus]
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
The one (The one)
In another life
I would make you stay
So I don't have to say you were
The one that got away
The one that got away

snippet.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
“Forgive me for all I’ve done” Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters and IMAX December 18. #DuneMovie#FilmedforIMAX

From Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures comes Dune: Part Three, bringing Academy Award-nominated filmmaker Denis Villeneuve’s epic trilogy to a breathtaking conclusion.

Dune: Part Three is set nearly two decades after Paul Atreides seized control of the Imperium. Now a ruthless Emperor, Paul must face the consequences of his reign as old allies return, terrifying new threats emerge, and betrayal lurks in every shadow. Haunted by visions of Imperial collapse and the reappearance of his long-lost love, Paul is drawn into a sweeping conspiracy, with Chani at the heart of its unfolding mystery. As rebellion brews and enemies close in, Paul must confront the true cost of power and the fate of those he loves the most.

The film stars Oscar nominee Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Oscar nominee Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach de Bankolé, with Oscar nominee Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Oscar winner Javier Bardem.

Villeneuve directs from a screenplay by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, based on the novels written by Frank Herbert. The film is produced by Oscar nominees Mary Parent, Cale Boyter, Villeneuve and Tanya Lapointe, and Joe Caracciolo, and executive produced by Joshua Grode, Thomas Tull, Herbert W. Gains, Brian Herbert, Byron Merritt, Kim Herbert, Kevin J. Anderson, Richard P. Rubinstein, John Harrison and Jessica Derhammer.

Joining Villeneuve behind the camera are Oscar-winning director of photography Linus Sandgren, Oscar-winning production designer Patrice Vermette, Oscar-winning editor Joe Walker, Oscar nominated costume designer Jacqueline West, Oscar-nominated casting director Francine Maisler, and Oscar-winning composer Hans Zimmer.

Warner Bros. Pictures and Legendary Pictures Present A Legendary Pictures Production, A Film By Denis Villeneuve, Dune: Part Three, only in theaters and IMAX® across North America on December 18, 2026 and internationally beginning 16 December 2026. The film will be distributed worldwide by Warner Bros. Pictures and in China by Legendary East.

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community.  Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

snippet.title: 《功夫女足》公佈演員名單預告片 周六內地上映力爭暑假首段票房
snippet.description:
《功夫女足》公佈演員名單預告片 周六內地上映力爭暑假首段票房

周星馳 自編自導嘅最新作品《功夫女足》，早前事先張揚將隨時突擊上映後，星期一正式宣布新片鐵定於7月11日公映，同時公佈嘅演出名單當中，亦可見包括主演包括 張小斐 迪麗熱巴 以及男星 張藝興，仲包括香港觀眾熟悉嘅 劉嘉玲 蔡思貝 張繼聰、歐陽靖 (MC Jin)，近年以楝篤笑聞名嘅 歐陽萬成 鄧月平 亦出現名單之中，另外日本男星 佐藤健 同 舞蹈組合 AVANTGARDEY 亦參與其中。

據指《功夫女足》講述「娥眉隊」女子足球隊，以傳統少林功夫融入現代足球，一路逆襲奪冠嘅故事。

除中港日明星陣容之外，據傳新片仲會出現韓國國寶級影帝 宋康昊 出演裁判，而前國家女足球主將 趙麗娜、李佳悅 亦會出演兼擔任技術指導，仲有傳聞指多位《少林足球》成員將客串驚喜現身。

snippet.description:
The Jungle is Expanding!

Theo James returns as Eddie aka The Duke, and this time he's back with a new sense of ambition. To grow the empire, he extends his reach across borders, taking on the Italian mafia. Directed by Guy Ritchie, Season 2 of The Gentlemen launches September 3rd only on Netflix.

Watch The Gentlemen: Season 2, only on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/TheGentlemen

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

The Gentlemen: Season 2 | Official Teaser | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

Eddie has big plans to expand his thriving empire — with or without Bobby's blessing. Susie starts sniffing out a new way to diversify the business.

snippet.title: จำได้ว่าลืม (Flashback) - William Jakrapatr [ OFFICIAL MV ]
snippet.description:
จำได้ว่าลืม (Flashback) - William Jakrapatr

Producer - KANGSOMKS
เรียบเรียง Arranged - Bomboi, Nittayah Maniwong
เนื้อเพลง Lyrics - KANGSOMKS
ทำนอง Melody - KANGSOMKS, Tui Chayatorn, KEVI
Assistant Composer - BarcodeTin
มิกซ์มาสเตอร์ Mix&Master - Kalvin
Vocal Director - PURE KANIN, Jeaniich, Kru Kit
Lyric Director - KANGSOMKS, William Jakrapatr

Digital Download *1232323
Spotify | iTunes | JOOX | Apple Music

SONG LYRICS:

[Verse 1]
นับตั้งแต่วันนั้น ที่เราได้จากลา
ฉันก็ไม่เคยนึก คิดถึงเธอสักครา
เหมือนเราไม่เคยรู้จักกัน
เหมือนฉันไม่เคยรู้จักเธอ
จนวันนี้ที่ได้กลับมาพบกัน

[Pre-Chorus]
ทุกสิ่งที่ฉันเคยปล่อยไป
วันนี้กลับเหมือนคว้ามันไว้
ที่เคยคิดว่าลืม กลับชัดขึ้นทุกวินาที
เพราะอะไรทำไมถึงเป็นแบบนี้

[Chorus]
จำได้ว่าลืม ลืมเธอไปแล้ว
จำได้ว่าลืม ลืมไปแล้วว่าเราเคยรักกัน
แต่วันนี้แค่ได้เจอ
ความคุ้นเคยมันตอกย้ำ
ว่าหัวใจยังคงเก็บเธอไว้
จำได้ว่าลืม ลืมเธอไปแล้ว
แต่ความจริงแล้วที่ใจฉันลืมก็คือการเริ่มใหม่
ต่อให้จำได้ว่าจบ
ลบเลือนไปสักแค่ไหน
สุดท้ายจำได้แล้วว่าทั้งใจไม่เคยลืมเธอ

[Verse2]
แล้วในวันนี้ฉันต้องทำไง
แค่เพียงมองตากันใจก็สั่นไหว
มันซ้ำและย้ำให้ฉันได้รู้ว่า
ความทรงจำมันยังคงค้างคา
และไม่เคยลบไปจากใจ 

[Pre-Chorus]
ยิ่งพยายามจะปล่อยไป
ยิ่งเหมือนมือฉันคว้าเธอไว้
ที่เคยคิดว่าลืม กลับชัดขึ้นทุกวินาที
เพราะอะไรทำไมถึงเป็นแบบนี้

[Chorus]
จำได้ว่าลืม ลืมเธอไปแล้ว
จำได้ว่าลืม ลืมไปแล้วว่าเราเคยรักกัน

[Bridge]
ฉันคงต้องยอมรับ ที่ผ่านมาไม่เคยลบเธอ
